hero.title: Asya Oleinichenko
hero.text: Five years shipping and evolving digital products. I know how teams work, how products behave in the wild, and how to keep craft simple and solid.

projectDetail.mvpHelp: Use the side arrows, the dots below, or the left and right keys to change slides. On mobile, swipe left or right.

errors.rootBody: Open the browser console (F12 → Console). If the URL or build base path is wrong, scripts may fail to load (blank white screen).

intro.name: Asya Oleinichenko
intro.lead1: Product designer at Mail (VK): monetization, personalization, and shipping features across mail and cloud. Five years in product — from research and prototypes to releases and metric-led experiments.
intro.lead2: I care about growth systems, AI in interfaces, and design that works for both people and the business. Open to new roles and collaborations.

team.title: Team
team.body: I work in cross-functional teams with PMs, analytics, engineering, and researchers — from hypothesis to experiment readout.

habitat.title: Beyond work
habitat.body: City life, music, internet visual noise, and an endless stream of references — where I recharge for interfaces and art direction.

memes.title: Favorite memes by imaginary people
memes.body: A stash of absurd images and quotes without context — a reminder that products live in culture, not only in dashboards.

strip.note: Site in progress. Some layout was drafted with AI and finished by hand. Something broke —

jobs.title: Product designer
jobs.text: Monetization and personalization across Mail: upsell flows, subscriptions, LTV scenarios, close work with analytics and research.

jobs.title: Head of Product Design
jobs.text: Led product design for edtech: process, release quality, tying design to metrics and content.

jobs.title: Special projects & content
jobs.text: Built the special-projects stream from zero: dozens of concepts, AI in the pipeline, scaling production.

eduItems.line: Faculty of communications, media, and design

eduItems.detail: Intensive on product design and leadership
